_note: WLED preset & playlist OPTION labels — the standard UI for creating presets/playlists (NOT the user's own preset names, which are personal data). Key = English label; per-language {name, desc}.

en.name: Save preset
en.desc: Store the current look as a numbered preset.

fr.desc: Store the current look as a numbered preset.
